name: mcp-us-business-data
description: Search US business entity registrations across 17 states, building permits in 400+ cities, and YellowPages business leads. Returns entity status, officers, registered agents, and addresses from official Secretary of State databases.

http.description: Connect via Apify MCP gateway (SSE transport)

tools.name: search_business_entities
tools.description: Search Secretary of State records across 17 US states by business name

states.description: State codes (NY, TX, CA, FL, etc.)

tools.name: search_building_permits
tools.description: Search building permits and contractor leads across 400+ US cities

tools.name: search_yellowpages
tools.description: Search YellowPages for business contact info, phone, address, and reviews

examples.title: Business entity lookup
examples.description: Search for a company across multiple states
examples.prompt: Find all business registrations for Tesla across US states

examples.title: Building permits
examples.prompt: Show me recent building permits in Seattle

examples.title: Local business search
examples.description: Find businesses by type and location
examples.prompt: Find plumbers in Austin, TX with their phone numbers and reviews
